### 1. 96035745-eafb-42f8-81cf-4493f946e853.pdf.txt — L183 — priority 19

**[MEEK3/MEEK4 | 96035745-eafb-42f8-81cf-4493f946e853.pdf.txt | OCR-TXT-L183]** Quote-Locked Statement: “audio/video for all hearings, PPO show-cause proceedings, contempt hearings, objections, and parenting-time” Petitioner objects and responds under oath that this statement is false, misleading, incomplete, and/or weaponized out of context as used against him. Petitioner preserves RECORD_CLARIFICATION_AND_WEIGHT_CHALLENGE and invokes MRE 901 (authentication), MRE 1002/1004 (best evidence where applicable), MCL 600.2950 (PPO statute), MCR 3.705/3.707/3.708 (PPO procedure/violation hearing rails), MCR 2.003 (judicial disqualification), MCJC Canon 2 & Canon 3(A)(4) (impartiality / ex parte) as applicable. No adverse inference should stand without authenticated exhibits, competent testimony, transcript-cited findings, and full chronology, including omitted exculpatory facts. Parenting-time use requires a child-specific safety nexus and less-restrictive analysis; PPO/contempt use requires strict proof of each element and valid service/notice; ex parte/judicial-handling use preserves impartiality and due-process objections for correction and oversight. Context Window: Additional Mandatory Production — Transcripts & Audio | Court Reporters / Recording Services (Muskegon 14th Circuit): Produce certified transcripts AND the original | audio/video for all hearings, PPO show-cause proceedings, contempt hearings, objections, and parenting-time | hearings from 2023-10-01 to present.
